name: Wayne Dyer
abstract: Wayne Walter Dyer (May 10, 1940 – August 29, 2015) was an American self-help author and a motivational speaker. Dyer earned a bachelor's degree in History and Philosophy, a master's degree in psychology and an Ed.D.

concerts.label: Lecture by Dr. Wayne W. Dyer

about_quotes.speaker: Sherrie Maricle
about_quotes.evidence: I love something that Wayne Dyer, a great guru who I love all of his work
